mapper.select: SELECT * FROM LANDMARK WHERE TITLE LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' AND (#{region} = '' OR ADDR1 LIKE '%' || #{region} || '%') and content_type_id not in ('15','25','28') ORDER BY TITLE OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LANDMARK WHERE TITLE LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' AND (#{region} = '' OR ADDR1 LIKE '%' || #{region} || '%') and content_type_id not in ('15','25','28')
